title: moltkia parviflora
intro: Moltkia parviflora, also known as the lesser mullein or small mullein, is a flowering plant species in the genus Moltkia, native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Moltkia parviflora include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Moltkia parviflora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to calm coughs and reduce inflammation.
